'''Isen IV''' was an airless, rocky [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]], one of five [[Satellite/Legends|satellites]] of the proto–[[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Isen]] in the [[Isen system/Legends|Isen system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. Its tunnels were inhabited by about 500 [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and also by non-[[Sentience/Legends|sapient]] [[morvak]]. It originally housed a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] colony managed by the representative [[Omana Tragg]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the Republic and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]. It became the location of the [[Void Demons]]' [[Void Demon pirate base|pirate base]]. 

[[File:Isen_IV_world_map.jpg|250px|Map of Isen IV]]
